title: astragalus lagopoides
intro: Astragalus lagopoides, also known as the Wyoming milkvetch, is a perennial plant species belonging to the legume family, Fabaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its adaptogenic and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Astragalus lagopoides include its potential to boost the immune system, reduce stress and fatigue, and improve cardiovascular health. Traditionally, the plant is prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, often in combination with other medicinal herbs, to support overall well-being and promote resilience against disease.
